title: Colors cubed
description:
A mix of a vanilla + mod pack and a optimization mod pack with some other mods.

btw if there is a mod i can not use tell me and i will get rid of them
body:
Colors split is a vanilla + Modpack with optimizations to help with fps. 



- menu for version 1.1.2a
![main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ccdb9a91874c65def56aec3037de2a6fbc57d6.png)

- menu for version 1.1.3b
![main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6acc2628d14bfef2e6401bb5bdbde50be358805.png)

- menu for version 1.1.4b
![main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/876a90946531464c3ef529781996c93f1f937f1a.png)
### modlist (vanilla+)
- apple skin
- better f3
- Boat item view
- chatheads
- cherished worlds
- double doors
- Dungeons and Taverns
- Dynamic Crosshair
- Eating Animation
- EnchantmentDescriptions
- FallingTree
- Forgotten Graves
- Highlighter
- Interactic
- Item Borders
- Jade
- Make Bubbles Pop
- Map Atlases
- Mod Menu
- More Chat History
- Mouse Tweaks
- No Chat Reports
- Pick Up Notifier
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Shulker Drops Two
- Tom's Simple Storage Mod
- Wakes
- ToolTip Fix
- and some yungs mods

### modlist (optimizations)
- Clumps
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
- Continuity
- Cull Leaves
- Debugify
- FastQuit
- FerriteCore
- FPS Reducer
- ImmediatelyFast
- Indium
- Iris
- Ksyxis
- LambDynamicLights
- LazyDFU
- Let Me Despawn
- Lithium
- Memory Leak Fix
- Model Gap Fix
- ModernFix
- NetherPortalFix
- Noisium
- Remove Reloading Screen
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
- Starlight
- ThreadTweak

hi I am new to making mod packs if I have done something wrong, please tell me and I will fix it :)


I’m thinking of making a quilt version of the pack idk if I will.
